We were excited to have this kitty condo for our 3 cats. Assembly wasn't too bad. It took about an hour from start to finish. It was missing one bolt, but my husband found one in his work bench. The unit is taller than I expected and has lots of different levels for the cats. It's not as sturdy as some cat condos that I have seen, but it's not flimsy either. An average sized cat would do fine with it, but a larger one might cause it to wobble a little, but I don't think it would topple over or anything. For the money, I would consider this a good deal. Cat condos can be very pricey, and this one is reasonably priced.

This replaced a 12" JBL venue sub from about 15 years ago. I have always liked Klipsch but this is the first home audio product I have owned of theirs and I am super happy.
I use this in conjunction with my LG SK9Y sound bar. I removed the speaker cables and fed them into a Low level line converter and that runs to the LFE input on the subwoofer.
It works wonderfully and really fills in as much as or better than the Venue did before. MILES BEYOND the stock 8 inch on for the sound bar.
I would recommend this sub for any home audio system. It's not small though so make sure you have room.

Used with a light pre-styler on medium-length hair:

Scent: It's a light scent. Warm and slightly spiced. Very pleasant and masculine.
Consistency: Extremely creamy. Becomes slightly tacky when emulsifying.
Styling: Smooth through the hair at first, with increasing tug the more you style. This is not a problem for me and is part of getting great hold from a product.
Finish: Slightly shiny at first, but becomes much more matte as it dries in the hair.
Hold: Legitimate all-day hold without becoming too rigid to restyle.

I bought a Targus PA248U Notebook Chill Pad to cool down my laptop, in an effort to extend the life of the system. Almost from the beginning it was problematic and represents one of the worst purchases I have ever made when it comes to computer equipment.

When it was brand new it worked pretty well, but it did not last. After a couple of weeks it started to get louder and louder and finally one of the fans decided to quit working. I disassembled the Chill Pad and oiled the fan’s spindle, and that helped it for a couple of weeks before it did it again. So, to keep the thing working I had to take it apart every couple of weeks and oil the fans. This was a nuisance but was not really a big deal as I have been through this kind of effort with other fans in the past.

Then
Doesn't  stay cool for long when refrigerated. Am going to try freezing. Hope I get better results.

I try real hard to be honest in every review. Some vendors take offense to honesty and products that are not a 5-star rating. But, we on Amazon, truly depend on each other and honesty for products that we want to purchase. We are all different but for me this is my honest assessment. The tablet case does secure the LG G f8 (8inch) tablet well. But, I have had a similar case in the past for my Kindle Fire and never had any issues. It is very strong and durable. My issue is with the keyboard and how it secures with the tablet case. The keyboard is a sturdy construction and not a silicone keypad. BUT, there is not tiny mouse pad within its design. That means to make my LG G tablet truly functional for writing documents, emails and the such I need to have an additional item - a wireless mouse;

This DARKLATER Tongue Scraper is not worth the time. I used both of the scrapers. I could not tell a difference after using them. I am not sure if I was doing it right but it did not come with instructions.

The set comes with two scrapers in a metal container. Both of the scrapers are metal with a copper look. I did go to the Amazon website to see if there were instructions. What I found was a section for Videos. Under that was this: Help others learn more about this product by uploading a video! Then a button that says: "Upload video". I will not upload a video just to help others learn about the product when I don't even know about the product!

I will NOT be recommending this DARKLATER Tongue Scraper to family and friends.

This brush's best feature is supposed to be that it is a cinch to clean but it is not so easy. First I brushed my long-haired cats, and then I retracted the bristles with the button. The button is very difficult to hold down and when it is held down all the way (with a lot of elbow grease), the tines still sit slightly above the base (see photo). As a result, I have to pick off the hair that remains on top instead of sliding it off. 

The other negative is that the tines bend immediately on first use as the wire is not strong (see photo). Also, the bristles on brushes like these, including this one, do not grab the hair like my wire brushes do. This means it does not pull off as much hair as the stationary brushes.

I have Echo's all throughout my house.  But, as a writer, I quickly learned that recently, distraction has now become the norm with Echo Show. Pop-Up Ads show up every 5-10 seconds, disrupting my photo collection and my train of thought. And then to integrate Avatar items into responses is annoying as can be! No, I don't want to play all those games you are showing continuously. I've contacted Amazon and was told that they are paid ads and I cannot remove them or refuse them. So, I am no longer a fan because you see, I also have Google Nest in my home, and truth be told, they show my photo collection much sharper, the sound is better when playing music and I have found, much smarter when in need of information, and the best part... NO ADS! NO INTERRUPTIONS! NO TRYING TO SELL YOU ANYTHING.

When this thing arrived, I attacked our bed sheets immediately just to test it out. This thing picked up all the fur immediately. That night, we slept like peaceful kittens in a virtually fur-free bed.

Don't hesitate buying one for your

My 13 year old Keeshond Sheltie really likes these. As far as she's concerned, it's a treat. Because of her size, I have been giving her 1 in the morning & 1 in the evening. I've been a fan of probiotics for a few years now, so it makes sense that our fur babies would benefit from them, too. They are soft and easy to chew and she loves the taste. She's only been taking these for a week, so I haven't noticed much difference yet regarding any tummy or digestive issues. She has a couple of "hot spots" and I have actually noticed less chewing on those areas which is very welcome!

*I received these from Paw Choice for the purpose of trying them & reviewing. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

One of the new girls is very skittish, but she also bullies the others. Our original cat retaliates. I currently have one of these units in our bedroom and the other in the kitchen near their food. It does seem to help and bring peace to our home. It's not continuous, but the fighting and hissing is lessened. It is a bit pricey, so I don't always have the refills, but I try.

I don't need ultimate privacy. Just enough so that the person next to me on an airplane can't see exactly what I'm doing. Unfortunately, this doesn't even provide enough protection for that.
